# web-app-coding

This companion note mirrors the `SKILL.md` file for the Live Chat App coding workflow.

Use this workflow for focused client or server changes in this repository:
- React/Vite UI work in `client/`
- Express/socket.io API work in `server/`
- Auth, routing, message flow, and validation checks

Recommended checks:
- `npm run lint` for client changes
- `npm run build` for production-facing client changes
- `npm run dev` or `npm start` for server-side checks
